name: Vanguard Total Bond Market ETF
description: Broad fixed income exposure to reduce portfolio volatility. Provides ballast against equity drawdowns and yields approximately 4.2% in current rate environment.
expectedBenefit: Reduce overall portfolio risk by 15-20% while maintaining income. Acts as a hedge against further equity market declines.

name: iShares MSCI Min Vol USA ETF
description: Low-volatility equity fund that targets minimum variance. Ideal for rotating out of high-beta tech holdings while maintaining equity market exposure.
expectedBenefit: Maintain equity upside participation with 30% lower volatility than the S&P 500. Reduces drawdown risk during market corrections.

name: SPDR Gold Shares
description: Gold ETF for portfolio hedging against inflation and geopolitical risk. With energy supply concerns and persistent inflation, gold serves as a traditional safe haven.
expectedBenefit: Portfolio hedge providing 5-8% expected return in risk-off scenarios. Historically low correlation to equities provides diversification benefit.

name: Consumer Staples Select Sector SPDR
description: Defensive consumer staples sector ETF with strong dividend yield. Includes Procter & Gamble, Coca-Cola, and Walmart — companies outperforming in current rotation.
expectedBenefit: Capture defensive rotation trend with 2.8% dividend yield. Sector has outperformed S&P 500 by 3.3% over the past month.

name: Utilities Select Sector SPDR
description: Utilities sector ETF offering stable dividends and low volatility. Current inflows indicate strong institutional demand for yield-producing safe havens.
expectedBenefit: Stable 3.1% dividend yield with lower beta (~0.5). Provides portfolio stability during market turbulence with consistent cash flow generation.

name: iShares Short Treasury Bond ETF
description: Ultra-short duration treasury bonds for capital preservation. Yields approximately 5.1% with minimal interest rate risk. Ideal parking spot while awaiting market stabilization.
expectedBenefit: Near-zero downside risk with 5.1% yield. Preserves capital while providing optionality to redeploy at better entry points.

name: Berkshire Hathaway Inc
description: High-quality conglomerate with diversified business exposure and strong cash position ($150B+). Historically outperforms during market corrections and provides broad sector exposure.
expectedBenefit: Quality factor exposure with low downside capture ratio. Strong balance sheet provides a margin of safety in volatile markets.

name: Energy Select Sector SPDR
description: Energy sector ETF benefiting from supply disruption tailwinds. Sector is up 7% this month and provides natural inflation hedge. Suitable for portfolios underweight energy.
expectedBenefit: Capitalize on energy supply disruption trends with potential for continued upside. Provides inflation protection and portfolio diversification.
